content: Hi, I'm thinking about getting a pet for my fiancé and me. We're getting married next year and we want to start our new life together with a pet.
That's so exciting! Congratulations on your upcoming wedding! What kind of pet were you considering getting?
I was thinking maybe a cat or a dog. My fiancé loves cats, but I've always wanted a dog. I've been so busy with my work at SpaceX, I haven't had time to think about it much.
It's great that you're considering each other's preferences. Cats and dogs are both wonderful companions. Have you thought about how you'll care for the pet while you're away at work?

Yeah, I've thought about that. I have a colleague, David, who has a dog and he's always talking about how much work it is. But I think it would be worth it for us. I might have to hire a pet sitter or ask my friend, Rachel, to check in on them.
That's a good idea. Pet sitters can be really helpful. What's your living situation like? Do you have a big house or a small apartment?

We have a big house with a backyard. I think a dog would be a great fit for us, but my fiancé is really set on getting a cat. I've been trying to convince her to visit the animal shelter with me on Saturday, June 10th.
It's great that you're involving your fiancé in the decision-making process. Visiting the animal shelter can be a great way to find the perfect pet. What's your favorite type of animal, by the way?

I've always loved dogs, but I've recently developed a fondness for birds. I've been thinking about getting a bird for myself, maybe a parakeet or a cockatiel. I've been doing some research and I think I'll get one on July 15th.

Birds can be wonderful pets! They're so intelligent and social. If you do get a bird, make sure to provide it with plenty of toys and attention. Have you thought about how you'll balance taking care of a bird with your busy work schedule as an aerospace engineer?

Yeah, I've thought about that. I think I can make it work. I've been learning about different types of birds and their personalities. I'm really interested in learning more about parakeets and cockatiels.
Those are both great choices. Parakeets and cockatiels are known for being friendly and affectionate. If you have any more questions or need any advice, feel free to ask!
Thanks, I will! I'm also thinking about starting a new hobby, maybe calligraphy or knitting. I've always loved making things and I think it would be a great way to relax.
That sounds like a great idea! Calligraphy and knitting can be very therapeutic. What kind of materials do you plan on using for your new hobby?
I'm not sure yet, I've been doing some research. I've heard great things about the Tombow pens. I'm thinking about purchasing one on August 1st.
The Tombow pens are a great choice. They're known for their high-quality ink and durability. Good luck with your new hobby and your new pet!
Thanks, I'm excited to start this new chapter! I'll be sure to post updates on my social media about my bird and our adventures.
